health_conditions: post-op tummy tuck with muscle repair
small hypertrophic area on breast incision

benefits.description: Excellent results in inflammation/swelling reduction post tummy tuck; overall minimal swelling observed
Saw reduced inflammation from BPC and TB in first 9 days post-op

side_effects.description: Concern about potential for hypertrophic scarring due to early post-op use; one small thick and raised area on breast incision noted at POD 9

protocol_notes: OP is an NP. Started KLOW on POD 1 following TT w/ MR and BL/BA. After reading concerns about hypertrophic scarring from early post-op use, decided to stop KLOW and restart at 4 weeks post-op. Previously mentioned seeing reduced inflammation from 'BPC and TB' suggesting prior or concurrent use of BPC-157 and TB-500 (possibly as part of KLOW formulation or separate). Had considered the 'Wolverine stack' as an alternative.
